positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric pattern featuring interlocking shapes and clean lines. The design must use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, cream, and burnt orange. The style should be reminiscent of mid-century modern Scandinavian design, suitable for repeating pattern use, vector art, negative space focus.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, gradient mess, messy lines
